name: Identity and Access Management
description: Manage Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) users and groups, RBAC, and subscriptions/governance.
objectives: Manage Microsoft Entra users and groups

name: Storage
description: Configure storage accounts, blob storage, Azure Files, and secure access.
objectives: Configure Azure Files and Azure Blob Storage

name: Compute
description: Deploy and manage virtual machines, containers, and Azure App Service.
objectives: Automate deployment of resources using ARM/Bicep
Create and configure Azure App Service

name: Networking
description: Configure virtual networking, name resolution, secure access, and load balancing.
objectives: Configure secure access to virtual networks
Configure name resolution and load balancing

name: Monitoring and Backup
description: Monitor resources with Azure Monitor and implement backup and recovery.
objectives: Monitor resources by using Azure Monitor
